caption: A man with a tall, grey, peaked wig, glasses, and black headphones is seated in a room filled with framed photos and clothing. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and light-colored suspenders. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him. The background features a wall of framed images and clothing racks, including a garment labeled "LEE." On-screen logos appear in the lower corners of the frame, including "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man is initially looking slightly to the side while speaking. He then shifts his posture, raising his right arm to touch the side of his head and adjusting his glasses with his fingers while continuing to look forward. The camera remains static throughout these movements, maintaining a medium shot of the man from the chest up.
